advancements.tide.moretidefish_pink_star: Who lives in a rock under the sea!
effect.moretidefish.electrified.descript: Every 20 seconds, the living entity will receive an electric shock, with the damage equal to the number of living entities chained, up to a maximum of 5
journal.description.tide.moretidefish_la: The lantern of the lantern fish can emit a weak light, but they are very fierce, be careful not to be bitten your head.
journal.description.tide.moretidefish_el: Electric eels can release powerful electricity, making them very dangerous.
journal.description.tide.moretidefish_pi: Pink starfish are rare creatures in the deep sea, they have pink skin, very cute.
journal.description.tide.moretidefish_re: Reaver sharks are sharks in the deep sea, they have very hard horns on their head.
journal.description.tide.moretidefish_pu: Pufferfish Bomb Fish are dangerous creatures in the deep sea, they have underwater explosion power, don't anger them.
commands.fishing.no_fish_finder: You must cast a fishing rod to use Fish Finder
tooltip.moretidefish.fish_finder_tooltip: After placing the fish finder in the other hand and casting the rod, press the left shift to detect potential fish catches
